title: Austria score dramatic late equaliser against Algeria as both progress
summary: Austria and Algeria both secured World Cup knockout stage advancement with a dramatic finish featuring goals by both teams in injury time. The result eliminated Iran from the tournament in heartbreaking circumstances.
content: Algeria and Austria produce an incredible finish to their Group J meeting, with both teams scoring in injury time to secure the point they need to reach the World Cup knockout stages - and send home Iran.

title: England last-32 tie on BBC - see full schedule

title: Kane and Bellingham proved again why they are key players - Tuchel
summary: England defeated Panama 2-0 in their final Group L match at the 2026 World Cup, with goals from Harry Kane and Jude Bellingham helping them finish as group winners. Manager Thomas Tuchel praised both players for their crucial performances on the tournament's biggest stage.
content: Thomas Tuchel says Harry Kane and Jude Bellingham proved once again why they are key players for England, after both men scored in a 2-0 win over Panama which sees Tuchel's team win Group L at the 2026 World Cup.

zh.title: 凯恩和贝林厄姆再次证明自己为何是关键球员 - 图赫尔
zh.summary: 英格兰在2026年世界杯L组最后一场比赛中2-0战胜巴拿马，凯恩和贝林厄姆的进球帮助球队以小组第一身份晋级。主教练托马斯·图赫尔称赞这两名球员在这项全球最大赛事中的关键表现。

title: Rashford says he wasn't at 'best level' in first start of World Cup
summary: Marcus Rashford made his first World Cup start in England's 2-0 victory over Panama. The forward acknowledged his performance wasn't at his peak level and expressed confidence in improving as the tournament progresses.
content: After making his first start of the World Cup in England's 2-0 win against Panama, Marcus Rashford says he can raise his game going forward in the tournament.

zh.title: 拉什福德表示首次世界杯首发时未处于最佳状态
zh.summary: 马库斯·拉什福德在英格兰2-0战胜巴拿马的比赛中完成了世界杯首秀。这名前锋承认自己的表现未达到巅峰水平，但表示有信心在赛事进行中逐步提高。

title: 'He's that guy!' Pundits praise 'brilliant' Bellingham
summary: Jude Bellingham delivered an impressive performance against Panama with a goal and an assist, drawing praise from BBC pundits Micah Richards and Wayne Rooney. They highlighted his "desire and hunger" as exemplary traits for competing at the World Cup.
content: BBC Sport World Cup pundits Micah Richards and Wayne Rooney praise Jude Bellingham's "desire and hunger" to perform on the biggest stage, after the England midfielder produces a goal and an assist in England's 2-0 win over Panama.

zh.title: "他就是那个人！"专家盛赞贝林厄姆"出色"表现
zh.summary: 朱德·贝林厄姆在对阵巴拿马的比赛中表现抢眼，打进一球并助攻一次，获得BBC评论员米卡·理查兹和韦恩·鲁尼的高度称赞。他们强调他的"渴望和饥饿感"是在世界杯竞争中的典范品质。

title: Croatia beat Ghana to reach knockout stages
summary: Croatia secured their place in the World Cup knockout stages with a victory over Ghana in Philadelphia. Nikola Vlasic's late header proved decisive in booking their spot in the last 32.
content: Nikola Vlasic scores a late header as Croatia booked their place in the World Cup last 32 with victory over already-qualified Ghana in Philadelphia.

zh.title: 克罗地亚击败加纳晋级淘汰赛
zh.summary: 克罗地亚在费城以击败加纳的胜利确保了他们在世界杯淘汰赛中的席位。尼古拉·弗拉西奇的后期头球对确保他们晋级前32强发挥了决定性作用。
